name: Ghoul Guard
implicitMods: Recover 5% of Life when you Block

socketedItems.secDescrText: Enchants your shield with the power of storms, which lashes out to deal arcing lightning damage to attackers when you block them.
explicitMods: Buff grants +26% Chance to Block Spell Damage while holding a Shield
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will apply a cost & reservation multiplier to supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff providing fire damage based on your physical damage. While you have this buff, if you kill an enemy, other enemies near them will be burned based on the overkill damage. The burn inflicted by this skill can only be affected by modifiers to damage over time (burning damage is damage over time).
explicitMods: Base Burning Damage is 25% of Overkill Damage
Buff grants 21% of your Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Nebulis
enchantMods: Quality does not increase Physical Damage
Grants 1% increased Area of Effect per 4% Quality
implicitMods: +6% to Quality of Socketed Lightning Gems
explicitMods: 10% increased Elemental Damage per 1% Fire, Cold, or Lightning Resistance above 75%
flavourText: The vastness of the cosmos holds energies beyond comprehension,
should one have the fortitude to grasp them.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Each supported spell will track how much mana you spend on it, granting a buff when the total mana spent reaches a threshold. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, mines or skills with a reservation.

Gain Arcane Surge after Spending a total of 15 Mana on

Arcane Surge grants 20% increased Cast Speed
Arcane Surge grants 30% increased Mana Regeneration rate

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies and leaving Chilled ground in an area at both ends of the teleport. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.

19% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Normal or Magic Enemy in Area
98% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Rare or Unique Enemy in Area
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Engulfs you in magical fire that rapidly burns you and nearby enemies. Your spell damage is substantially increased while under this effect. The effect ends when you have 1 life remaining.

Deals 70% of your Maximum Energy Shield as Base Fire Damage per second
You Burn for 90% of your Maximum Life per second as Fire Damage
You Burn for 70% of your Maximum Energy Shield per second as Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Buffs you, and affects nearby enemies with an aura, differently depending on your stance. Both stances are more impactful against enemies closer to you. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.
explicitMods: While in Blood Stance, Aura makes Enemies take up to 20% more Physical Damage from Hits
While in Sand Stance, Buff makes you take up to 19% less Damage from Enemies in Aura
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants fire resistance to you and your allies.

You and nearby allies gain 4% additional maximum Fire Resistance

flavourText: "Although we are two bodies, we are of one mind, one heart, drifting
through the cosmos, in search of purpose. The moment we cross paths,
both fleeting and eternal, our eyes are opened to our potential."

implicitMods: 9% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills

craftedMods: +1 to Level of Socketed AoE Gems

socketedItems.secDescrText: Take less Physical and Elemental Damage for a short time. Consumes up to 5 Endurance Charges to lengthen the buff and further lessen Physical Damage taken. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: 20% increased Buff Duration per Endurance Charge removed
This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect
15.0% less Physical Damage taken per Endurance Charge removed

properties.name: Attack, Melee, AoE, Movement, Travel, Physical

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. You deal damage in a larger area when you reach the target. The further you travel, the more damage you deal, and the greater your chance of stunning enemies.
explicitMods: 252 to 378 Base Off Hand Physical Damage
8 to 12 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield
75% increased Stun Threshold reduction on enemies at Maximum charge distance
100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance

flavourText: The Black Sekhema was a formidable fighter
alongside her dekhara, but she was unstoppable
when she fought atop her trusted mount, Shiyo.

explicitMods: You take 48% reduced Extra Damage from Critical Strikes

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports melee strike skills, causing them to also strike at extra targets simultaneously. The extra targets must be a minimum distance from the user. If supporting a minion attack skill, the minion's skills will not also strike extra targets. Cannot support Vaal skills or triggered skills.

Extra Targets for Supported Skills can be found 40% further away
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Melee Damage

flavourText: "I believe the Halls of the Dead are secretly a
training ground. One day, we will be called
forth to stand and fight against a great tide."

flavourText: Zana watched in awe as her father spoke. With each word,
he seemed to grow larger and more frightening, drawing
increasingly fervorous responses from his rapt audience.

flavourText: "When the hyena howls thrice
death is sure to follow."
-Maraketh Wisdom

flavourText: In truth, your terror is cold
You mask it with heat and ire
But they know.
They know.

a better world... but building requires sacrifice, and the useless
would be crushed into the foundation of her new utopia.

flavourText: "True power grows with patience. You must nurture it.
You learn what it needs. You provide. You wait. Only
then, when it is ripe, does it yield its fruits."

flavourText: Ennui prevailed, until inspiration sparked
a mote of flame, kindled by fury
and all in his path were obliterated.

flavourText: "A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom
